title: Add 95% CI to Kaplan-Meier survival curves
body: The survival curve plots for the mRNA-4157 primary endpoint need confidence intervals added. Currently only showing point estimates.

title: Switch missing data imputation to MICE
body: The imputation model for missing 12-week follow-up data needs to be updated to use multiple imputation (MICE) instead of single mean imputation per protocol.

title: Missing attendance data for weeks 7-8
body: Week 7 and 8 attendance data for PH 206 Spring 2026 cohort is missing from the course dataset. Students 14, 22, and 31 have no entries.

title: Add R Markdown lab report template
body: Add R Markdown template for lab reports so students have consistent formatting for problem sets 3 through 6.

title: Inconsistent ggplot2 theme across output types
body: The dataviz pipeline ggplot2 theme is not consistent across all output types. Forest plots use a different base font size than scatter plots.

title: Add README with study design and variable definitions
body: Add README documentation for the back-pain-analysis repo explaining the study design, variable definitions, and how to reproduce all key figures.

title: Add daily hormone level logging for stim phase
body: IVF tracker needs a module to log stimulation phase hormone levels (E2, LH, FSH, progesterone) on a per-day basis with date-stamped entries.
